title: Rei IIIIII
wikitext:
[]: Rei I...II....III?             Quote Post by bioweapon680 » Wed Jun 18, 2008 2:11 pm Okay, I'm not an expert in EVA, which is why I'm asking this question. I know for a fact there were three Reis. Rei I Rei II Rei III I know Rei I got strangled, and thus eliminated. I know Rei II got killed fighting Armisael. I don't know when or how Rei III came in. I always thought Rei II survived her fight with Armisael. I could almost swear I saw a scene where Shinji met her in the medical section of Geofront commenting about how she saved him. Was Rei III put in real fast to avoid Shinji finding out about Rei II dieing? How did she gain any of Rei II's knowledge? After all, clones aren't exactly alike in prior knowledge. Dang, I was hoping with all my EVA obsessed soul for a happy ending where Rei II gets along with Shinji. I think i might have to watch the episode where this happens again. Does someone mind telling me which episode the Armisael fight is in> OH, and why does a Rei in school uniform appear above every character before the die during Instrumentality in EoE? I always wanted to know that. Thanks a lot!

[]: Re: Rei I...II....III?             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jun 18, 2008 2:38 pm bioweapon680 wrote: I could almost swear I saw a scene where Shinji met her in the medical section of Geofront commenting about how she saved him.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jun 18, 2008 2:43 pm Rei II dies. Her soul is put in a clone with her memories backed up. Rei III is born. Stick her in a hospital for illusion of one continuous Rei.

[]: Re: Rei I...II....III?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jun 18, 2008 2:47 pm bioweapon680 wrote: I think i might have to watch the episode where this happens again. Does someone mind telling me which episode the Armisael fight is in.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jun 18, 2008 2:48 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Rei II dies. Her soul is put in a clone with her memories backed up. Rei III is born.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 18, 2008 3:44 pm Episode 23' during the medical ward scene is when Rei 3 first shows up. While Rei 3 doesn't necessarily remember certain events before, it seems like she at least remembers the feelings she's had for people. Was Rei III put in real fast to avoid Shinji finding out about Rei II dying?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jun 18, 2008 3:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Er..... EoE-final scene?? And Shinji would be "body #3" because of episode 20 and EoE? Sorry, just a bit lost what you meant by that.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jun 18, 2008 4:06 pm bioweapon680 wrote: OH, and why does a Rei in school uniform appear above every character before the die during Instrumentality in EoE? I always wanted to know that.

[]: Re: Rei I...II....III?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jun 18, 2008 4:13 pm bioweapon680 wrote: I always thought Rei II survived her fight with Armisael.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Jun 18, 2008 5:31 pm Atleast he's asking questions and not staying ignorent.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Wed Jun 18, 2008 6:02 pm Zuggy wrote: Rei is everyone's missing half. Remember what Armisael says to Rei in #23 and what Ritsuko says to Misato in the last episode about the cause of sorrow?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Jun 18, 2008 6:16 pm No, I ment it as a good thing. It's good to ask questions and not just staying quiet the entire time.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Wed Jun 18, 2008 6:30 pm Sumimasen - I'm imagining badness where none exists. (Guess I've been hanging around with everyone's favourite paranoid depressive protaganist, huh?) Definitely an agree with the asking questions thing though.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jun 19, 2008 1:16 am Zerogoki wrote: Zuggy wrote: Rei is everyone's missing half. Remember what Armisael says to Rei in #23 and what Ritsuko says to Misato in the last episode about the cause of sorrow?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jun 19, 2008 8:07 am Zuggy wrote: Rei is everyone's missing half. Remember what Armisael says to Rei in #23 and what Ritsuko says to Misato in the last episode about the cause of sorrow?

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Thu Jun 19, 2008 11:29 am I took it more of him meaning Rei is everyone complement concerning Instrumentality. What Gendo was talking about at some point versus Armisael. At least that was how I interpreted it (not that I agree mind you).

[]:             Quote Post by bioweapon680 » Thu Jun 19, 2008 11:40 am AuraTwilight wrote: Rei II dies. Her soul is put in a clone with her memories backed up. Rei III is born. Stick her in a hospital for illusion of one continuous Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jun 19, 2008 11:58 am OH, and why does a Rei in school uniform appear above every character before the die during Instrumentality in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Jun 19, 2008 12:16 pm Zerogoki wrote: The Armisael thing I get, but can't find the quote your referring to from Ritsuko. Care to elaborate?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Jun 19, 2008 1:05 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Not really. Shinji and Asuka made their new bodies themselves out of willpower. Rei's soul is getting forcibly moved into an organic doll that wasn't her original body in any shape or form to begin with. This is added by the fact that Rei II only had half the soul, and Rei III probably has the whole thing, and Gendo seems to reboot Rei's memories from the Dummy Plug with every resurrection. Works perfectly fine without plot holes.

Was Rei III put in real fast to avoid Shinji finding out about Rei II dieing? How did she gain any of Rei II's knowledge? After all, clones aren't exactly alike in prior knowledge.
